zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期盘整，压力仍存
zh.content:
比特币当前价格62627.25美元，较24小时内微跌0.18%，显示市场短期承压但波动有限。从价格高低点62846.31/62512.95来看，市场在窄幅区间震荡，短期趋势偏中性，投资者观望情绪明显。  

技术指标方面，SMA(20)位于63344.63美元之上，意味着价格仍低于短期均线，短期多头动力有限。MACD数值38.74411显示上行动能仍存在，但未出现明显交叉信号，暗示趋势尚未明朗，需谨慎操作。RSI未提供，无法判断超买或超卖状态，但价格盘整特征明显。  

支撑位方面，下方62500美元为近期低点支撑，若跌破可能触发短期卖压。阻力位在63350美元附近，与20日均线重合，突破该水平才能确认短期上涨趋势。区间操作风险可控，但突破信号尤为关键。  

交易建议上，短线可在支撑附近小幅低吸，设好止损控制风险；激进投资者可等待价格突破20日均线并伴随MACD上行动能确认后再介入。中期投资者仍应保持耐心，关注市场波动和关键阻力的突破情况，以规避不必要的震荡风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is trading at 62,627.25, posting a modest 24-hour decline of 0.18% and remaining near the lower end of the session range between 62,512.95 and 62,846.31. The broader short-term structure remains cautious, as price continues to trade below the 20-period simple moving average at 63,344.63. This suggests that sellers retain a slight advantage, with recent rallies struggling to establish sustained upside momentum.

The moving average configuration indicates a bearish short-term bias while price remains beneath the SMA(20). Although the MACD value of 38.74 remains positive, the absence of the signal line limits confirmation of a strong momentum shift. A positive MACD reading can still indicate underlying bullish pressure, but current price action shows that buyers have not yet regained enough strength to push the market back above key trend resistance levels.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the session low around 62,500. A decisive break below this area could expose further downside toward the psychologically important 62,000 region. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 62,850, followed by the SMA(20) around 63,345. A successful move above the moving average would improve sentiment and could encourage additional buying interest toward higher resistance zones.

Traders may consider maintaining a defensive stance while Bitcoin remains below the 20-period moving average. Conservative participants could wait for a confirmed breakout above 63,345 before pursuing long positions, as this would strengthen evidence of trend recovery. More aggressive traders may look for short-term opportunities within the current range, buying near support and taking profits near resistance while applying disciplined risk management. Given the relatively narrow trading range and mixed momentum signals, position sizing and stop-loss placement remain particularly important.
